steps.title: Identify the dimensions
steps.content: The width is $w=9$ cm. The length is $50$ cm longer than the width, so $\ell = 9 + 50 = 59$ cm.

steps.title: Apply the perimeter/area formula
steps.content: Area of a rectangle is $A = \ell \cdot w$, so $A = 59 \cdot 9 = 531$ square cm. That matches choice B — B is correct.
